title: Behavior Impact Dashboard

options.content: ## Fuel metrics are excluded in this dashboard

sql.statement: SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events WHERE event_type = 'idle over 5 min' AND device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND device_time < NOW()

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events WHERE event_type NOT IN ('idle over 5 min', 'rpm exceeded', 'overspeeding') AND device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND device_time < NOW()
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events WHERE event_type = 'rpm exceeded' AND device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND device_time < NOW()

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM processed_common_data.trips t JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW() AND t.max_speed IS NOT NULL AND t.max_speed > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 70)

WITH dpe AS (SELECT event_type, COUNT(*) AS n FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events WHERE device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND device_time < NOW() GROUP BY event_type), idle_n AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(n), 0)::numeric AS n FROM dpe WHERE event_type = 'idle over 5 min'), aggr_n AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(n), 0)::numeric AS n FROM dpe WHERE event_type NOT IN ('idle over 5 min', 'rpm exceeded', 'overspeeding')), speed_n AS (SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS n FROM processed_common_data.trips t JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW() AND t.max_speed IS NOT NULL AND t.max_speed > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 70)) SELECT behavior_type, event_count FROM (SELECT 'Idling >= 5 min'::text AS behavior_type, (SELECT n FROM idle_n) AS event_count UNION ALL SELECT 'Aggressive Driving', (SELECT n FROM aggr_n) UNION ALL SELECT 'High Speed Trips', (SELECT n FROM speed_n)) t WHERE event_count > 0

panels.title: Top Units: Idling vs Previous Week

sql.statement: WITH obj AS (SELECT o.device_id, COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || o.device_id::text) AS vehicle FROM raw_business_data.objects o WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), agg AS (SELECT dpe.device_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE dpe.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS current_week_idle, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE dpe.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND dpe.device_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS previous_week_idle FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events dpe WHERE dpe.event_type = 'idle over 5 min' AND dpe.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND dpe.device_time < NOW() GROUP BY dpe.device_id), top_units AS (SELECT a.device_id, a.current_week_idle, a.previous_week_idle FROM agg a WHERE a.current_week_idle > a.previous_week_idle ORDER BY (a.current_week_idle - a.previous_week_idle) DESC LIMIT 15) SELECT o.vehicle AS object_label, u.previous_week_idle::numeric AS idle_event_count, 'Previous Week'::text AS week_period FROM top_units u JOIN obj o ON o.device_id = u.device_id UNION ALL SELECT o.vehicle AS object_label, u.current_week_idle::numeric AS idle_event_count, 'Current Week'::text AS week_period FROM top_units u JOIN obj o ON o.device_id = u.device_id ORDER BY object_label, week_period DESC

panels.title: Top Units: Aggressive Driving vs Previous Week

sql.statement: WITH obj AS (SELECT o.device_id, COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || o.device_id::text) AS vehicle FROM raw_business_data.objects o WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), agg AS (SELECT hde.device_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hde.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS current_week_agg, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hde.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND hde.device_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS previous_week_agg FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events hde WHERE hde.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND hde.device_time < NOW() AND hde.event_type NOT IN ('idle over 5 min', 'rpm exceeded', 'overspeeding') GROUP BY hde.device_id), top_units AS (SELECT a.device_id, a.current_week_agg, a.previous_week_agg FROM agg a WHERE a.current_week_agg > a.previous_week_agg ORDER BY (a.current_week_agg - a.previous_week_agg) DESC LIMIT 15) SELECT o.vehicle AS object_label, u.previous_week_agg::numeric AS aggr_event_count, 'Previous Week'::text AS week_period FROM top_units u JOIN obj o ON o.device_id = u.device_id UNION ALL SELECT o.vehicle AS object_label, u.current_week_agg::numeric AS aggr_event_count, 'Current Week'::text AS week_period FROM top_units u JOIN obj o ON o.device_id = u.device_id ORDER BY object_label, week_period DESC

panels.title: Top Units: High Speed vs Previous Week

sql.statement: WITH obj AS (SELECT o.device_id, COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || o.device_id::text) AS vehicle FROM raw_business_data.objects o WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), veh_limits AS (SELECT o.device_id, COALESCE(v.max_speed, 70) AS speed_limit FROM raw_business_data.objects o LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), speeding_trips AS (SELECT t.device_id, t.trip_start_time, CASE WHEN t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 'Current Week' ELSE 'Previous Week' END AS period FROM processed_common_data.trips t JOIN veh_limits vl ON vl.device_id = t.device_id WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW() AND t.max_speed IS NOT NULL AND t.max_speed > vl.speed_limit), agg AS (SELECT st.device_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE st.period = 'Current Week') AS current_week_speed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE st.period = 'Previous Week') AS previous_week_speed FROM speeding_trips st GROUP BY st.device_id), top_units AS (SELECT a.device_id, a.current_week_speed, a.previous_week_speed FROM agg a WHERE a.current_week_speed > a.previous_week_speed ORDER BY (a.current_week_speed - a.previous_week_speed) DESC LIMIT 15) SELECT o.vehicle AS object_label, u.previous_week_speed::numeric AS speed_event_count, 'Previous Week'::text AS week_period FROM top_units u JOIN obj o ON o.device_id = u.device_id UNION ALL SELECT o.vehicle AS object_label, u.current_week_speed::numeric AS speed_event_count, 'Current Week'::text AS week_period FROM top_units u JOIN obj o ON o.device_id = u.device_id ORDER BY object_label, week_period DESC

panels.title: Top Units: High RPM > 5000 vs Previous Week

sql.statement: WITH obj AS (SELECT o.device_id, COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || o.device_id::text) AS vehicle FROM raw_business_data.objects o WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), agg AS (SELECT dpe.device_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE dpe.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS current_week_rpm, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE dpe.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND dpe.device_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS previous_week_rpm FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events dpe WHERE dpe.event_type = 'rpm exceeded' AND dpe.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND dpe.device_time < NOW() GROUP BY dpe.device_id), top_units AS (SELECT a.device_id, a.current_week_rpm, a.previous_week_rpm FROM agg a WHERE a.current_week_rpm > a.previous_week_rpm ORDER BY (a.current_week_rpm - a.previous_week_rpm) DESC LIMIT 15) SELECT o.vehicle AS object_label, u.previous_week_rpm::numeric AS rpm_event_count, 'Previous Week'::text AS week_period FROM top_units u JOIN obj o ON o.device_id = u.device_id UNION ALL SELECT o.vehicle AS object_label, u.current_week_rpm::numeric AS rpm_event_count, 'Current Week'::text AS week_period FROM top_units u JOIN obj o ON o.device_id = u.device_id ORDER BY object_label, week_period DESC

options.content: ## Operators with highest behavior impact on the same route (last 30 days)

sql.statement: WITH obj AS (SELECT o.device_id, COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || o.device_id::text) AS vehicle, COALESCE(e.last_name || ' ' || e.first_name, 'Unassigned') AS driver_name FROM raw_business_data.objects o LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.employees e ON e.object_id = o.object_id AND e.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), trips_30d AS (SELECT t.device_id, t.trip_start_time, t.trip_end_time, t.trip_distance_meters / 1000.0 AS trip_km, CASE WHEN NULLIF(t.start_zone, '') IS NOT NULL AND NULLIF(t.start_zone, '') = NULLIF(t.end_zone, '') THEN t.start_zone || ' [intra-zone]' ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(t.start_zone, ''), 'Uncommon Area') || ' -> ' || COALESCE(NULLIF(t.end_zone, ''), 'Uncommon Area') END AS route_name FROM processed_common_data.trips t WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW() AND t.trip_end_time > t.trip_start_time AND (NULLIF(t.start_zone, '') IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(t.end_zone, '') IS NOT NULL)), all_points AS (SELECT dpe.device_id, dpe.device_time, CASE WHEN dpe.event_type IN ('Driver performance acceleration', 'Driver performance acceleration and turn', 'Driver performance braking', 'Driver performance braking and turn') THEN 3.0 WHEN dpe.event_type IN ('idle over 5 min', 'rpm exceeded') THEN 1.0 ELSE 2.0 END AS weight FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events dpe WHERE dpe.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND dpe.device_time < NOW()), route_driver AS (SELECT tr.route_name, o.driver_name, o.vehicle, COUNT(*) AS trips_count, ROUND(SUM(tr.trip_km)::numeric, 2) AS distance_km, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ap.weight), 0)::numeric, 2) AS behavior_points FROM trips_30d tr JOIN obj o ON o.device_id = tr.device_id LEFT JOIN all_points ap ON ap.device_id = tr.device_id AND ap.device_time >= tr.trip_start_time AND ap.device_time <= tr.trip_end_time GROUP BY tr.route_name, o.driver_name, o.vehicle HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND SUM(tr.trip_km) >= 5), ranked AS (SELECT rd.route_name, rd.driver_name, rd.vehicle, rd.trips_count, rd.distance_km, rd.behavior_points, ROUND((rd.behavior_points / NULLIF(rd.distance_km, 0)) * 100, 2) AS points_per_100km, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY rd.route_name ORDER BY (rd.behavior_points / NULLIF(rd.distance_km, 0)) DESC NULLS LAST) AS route_rank FROM route_driver rd) SELECT route_name, driver_name, vehicle, trips_count, distance_km, behavior_points, points_per_100km, route_rank FROM ranked WHERE route_rank <= 3 ORDER BY points_per_100km DESC, route_name, driver_name LIMIT 500

description: Behavior Impact Dashboard without fuel metrics. 4 KPI big numbers + WoW barcharts (Idling, Aggressive Driving, High Speed, High RPM) + Route-Based Driver Impact table.
